reviews.text:
V is a phenomenal photographer who genuinely cares about both her clients and the final product. I told her upfront that I’m more comfortable behind the camera than in front of it. I went into our session just hoping I’d like a few of the shots because I’m usually pretty critical of myself. But when I got the gallery back, I was shocked by how many photos I actually loved. The ones I didn’t favor weren’t even bad. I just didn’t like something I did in them. That’s a huge first for me, like it never happens.

This was our engagement shoot, and somehow she managed to capture how much I love my fiancée without it looking staged or stiff. I’m genuinely impressed and already looking forward to the wedding. I just know those photos are going to be fire too. Highly recommend!

Veronica is wonderful. She stays calm and collected even during stress. She made our wedding day so much more peaceful and completely took control of all the photography details so we could be present in the moment. She also made us an incredible video that we will treasure FOREVER. Can't recommend her enough!!!!

I recently hired Veronica to photograph our grand opening event at Monument Vista Place. I met with Veronica a few weeks before the event and we walked through the property and discussed my goals. She was very professional.

On the day of the event she arrived early and was supported by a second photographer, Iliana, to help cover every angle. We had a huge turnout of over 200 people and Veronica and Iliana did a fantastic job of capturing all the fun. They also adapted to the changing light so even as the sun set they were able to get quality photos of our guests.

In the end we received a large volume of high quality images. I highly recommend Veronica and Iliana and will be hiring them again for future events.

Amazing!! Sneak peak and unique photography of behind the scenes for a music video for 2025🎥 [Artist: RIDER] & [Videographer: Tukay] And capturing every beautiful moment behind the sunset!!! [Photographer: Veronica]

Veronica does a fabulous job taking care of her clients and giving them the photos they dreamed of. She’s professional, kind, and a fantastic photographer for any type of setting. She got us in quickly, guided us through the process, and helped out when we got stuck with how to pose. She’s incredible, and I would absolutely suggest you check her out!
